no-restricted-syntax.message: Use LayoutContext.rng instead of Math.random in the substrate path. See AGENT_NATIVE.md § (0) Substrate. Exempt: src/agent/context.ts (createSeededRNG) and src/agent/context.ts withSeededRandom which intentionally manipulate Math.random.
Use LayoutContext.clock instead of Date.now in the substrate path.
Use LayoutContext.clock instead of performance.now in the substrate path.
